title_header: Solo Leveling, Episode 3: The Fourth Butterfly (Story/Art: Remin)

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YOU DAMN BUTTERFLIES! WHY WON'T YOU LEAVE US BUGS ALONE?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I-I'LL NEVER FORGIVE YOU FOR THIS. I'LL KILL YOU!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I CAN'T EVEN LAST THE IDIOT THING TOO.

dialogue.speaker: MONSTER
dialogue.line: FOOLISH BUG.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: AH, AH! CAN YOU HEAR ME, SARA? I KILLED IT. CAN YOU CHECK IT FOR ME?

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: Sure! I'M SCANNING THE BUG FOR ANY REACTION.

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: ALL VITAL ACTIVITIES HAVE CEASED. NO REACTION DETECTED! THE BUG IS CONFIRMED DEAD! MISSION COMPLETE! GOOD JOB, JAYEONG!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: Woohoo! SWEET. I'M FINALLY DONE FOR THE NIGHT. LET'S HAVE A BEER TOGETHER WHEN YOU GET BACK! Haha. OH, ONE SEC; LET ME CHECK ON THE VICTIM FIRST.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: HE'S IN COMPLETE SHOCK; THAT'S PRETTY COMMON THOUGH.

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: HEY, ARE YOU OKAY?

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: LISTEN: I'M SORRY ABOUT WHAT HAPPENED, BUT THAT WASN'T YOUR SISTER. YOUR SISTER WAS KILLED MONTHS AGO. THAT WAS JUST A BUG. I KNOW THAT MUST'VE BEEN A SHOCK, BUT JUST TRY TO FORGET ABOUT IT. COME ON, GET UP. I'LL HELP YOU.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: Did THE BUG HIT HIM ON THE HEAD OR SOMETHING? THIS IS SO ANNOYING.

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: WHAT IS IT, JAYEONG? IS SOMETHING WRONG?

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: HE'S JUST ACTING KIND OF WEIRD.

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: HEY, SERIOUSLY, DID YOU BUMP YOUR HEAD OR SOMETHING? YOU LOOK FINE TO ME. STOP BEING SUCH A BABY AND JUST GET UP. I'M BUSY.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: Huh? WHAT THE...? WHY IS YOUR HAND BLEEDING SO MUCH? WHEN DID YOU HURT YOUR HAND LIKE THAT?! HOLD ON! I'LL STOP THE BLEEDING FOR YOU!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: SARA, CAN YOU HEAR ME?! SEND AN AMBULANCE OVER HERE!

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: WHAT? O-OKAY!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: I CAN'T WAIT FOR THE AMBULANCE, I'LL HAVE TO USE THIS--

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: HEY, CAN YOU HEAR ME?! HEY! GIVE ME A SIGN IF YOU CAN HEAR ME!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: A BUTTERFLY?!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: JAYEONG!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: BLOOD. I'M NOT SUPPOSED TO BLEED. UGH! IF I BLEED...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHO THE HELL IS THIS GUY?! WHY DOES HE HAVE THE BUTTERFLY'S POWER?!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: BLOOD. BLOOD. BLOOD.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: UGH! I CAN'T BREATHE!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: NO! BLOOD!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: GET... PUSH- OFF ME!

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: ARE YOU OKAY, JAYEONG?

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: YOU LITTLE... HEY! THAT'S THE THANKS I GET FOR SAVING YOU?! ARE YOU OUT OF YOUR MIND?!

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: SIGH: I GUESS A KICK ISN'T ENOUGH TO BRING YOU BACK TO YOUR SENSES. YOU LEAVE ME NO CHOICE; I'LL JUST HAVE TO TRY SOMETHING STRONGER. THIS IS GOING TO HURT... A LOT!

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: PHEW... HE'S FINALLY QUIET NOW.

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: JAYEONG! I KNOW YOU WERE UPSET, BUT YOU CAN'T JUST KILL PEOPLE LIKE THAT! GASP!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: I DIDN'T KILL HIM! I KNOCKED HIM OUT! BESIDES! YOU SAW THAT POWER HE USED JUST NOW, DIDN'T YOU?!

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: YEP! THERE'S NO DOUBT ABOUT IT.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: MISS SHIN: THAT VOICE SOUNDS LIKE...!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: IS THAT DOCTOR YUJIN SEO?!

dialogue.speaker: DOCTOR YUJIN SEO
dialogue.line: BRING THAT BOY TO THE GARDEN IMMEDIATELY. WE'VE BEEN LOOKING FOR HIM. THAT BOY IS THE FOURTH BUTTERFLY: THE ONE THAT WE LOST.

dialogue.speaker: HUINA
dialogue.line: HUI... MAEHWA! WHAT... WHAT DID I DO? I CAN'T REMEMBER! I SUDDENLY STARTED BLEEDING... AND WHEN I CAME TO, EVERYONE WAS DEAD! I DIDN'T DO THIS, DID I? RIGHT? HUINA! IT'S NOT MY FAULT, IS IT?!

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWHA
dialogue.line: CALM DOWN. I HATE TO TELL YOU... BUT YOU DID THIS. I TOLD YOU SO MANY TIMES! YOU HAVE TO BE CAREFUL NOT TO BLEED. LISTEN CAREFULLY, MAEHWA. YOU'RE DIFFERENT FROM OTHER PEOPLE. YOU CAN'T GET CLOSE TO THEM. YOU CAN NEVER GET UPSET OR ANGRY. YOU MUST ALWAYS GO UNNOTICED. YOU CAN'T GET EVEN A TINY CUT. YOU HAVE TO LIVE LIKE YOU'RE INVISIBLE.

dialogue.speaker: HUINA
dialogue.line: BUT... BUT. HOW MUCH LONGER? HOW MUCH LONGER DO I HAVE TO LIVE LIKE THIS? DOES THIS MEAN... I'LL HAVE TO BE ALONE... FOREVER? UNTIL I DIE?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWHA
dialogue.line: DON'T WORRY. YOU HAVE ME.

dialogue.speaker: HUINA
dialogue.line: WHAT IF SOMETHING HAPPENS TO YOU?! WHAT WILL I DO THEN?! WHAT IF THIS... AND YOU CAN'T PUT UP WITH ME ANYMORE? WHAT IF YOU LEAVE ME TOO?! IT'S NOT FAIR! WHY AM I THE ONLY ONE LIKE THIS?! IS THAT WHY I LOST MY MEMORIES AND BECAME LIKE THIS?! IS IT BECAUSE OF THAT CAR ACCIDENT WHEN I WAS LITTLE? I'M SCARED. THE THOUGHT OF BEING ALONE SCARES ME MORE THAN ANYTHING IN THE WORLD!

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWHA
dialogue.line: I'M SORRY, MAEHWA. I KNOW IT'S A CRUEL THING TO ASK OF YOU. BUT LOOK AROUND YOU. BECAUSE OF THAT SELFISH DESIRE OF YOURS, YOUR FRIENDS ARE ALL... DEAD. HUH...? THIS CAN'T BE. N-NO. NO. AND... SO AM I.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: WHERE AM I? A HOSPITAL? UGH... MY HEAD HURTS. I DON'T REMEMBER ANYTHING. WHAT THE...?! WAIT, THIS ISN'T A HOSPITAL. IS IT SOME KIND OF GARDEN?

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: AH! YOU'RE AWAKE! HI THERE! HOW'S YOUR HEAD? DOES IT HURT?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I'M NOT SURPRISED. YOU CAN THANK A CERTAIN SOMEONE FOR THAT!

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: SHUT UP! ANYWAY, I'M GLAD YOU WOKE UP SO QUICKLY! NICE TO MEET YOU! MY NAME IS SARA. SARA LOPEZ (27). I'M A RESEARCHER IN CHARGE OF THE BUTTERFLIES. YOU'RE MAEHWA, RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: HOW DOES SHE KNOW MY NAME?

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: I'M SURE ALL THIS LOOKS VERY FAMILIAR TO YOU.

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: WHAT? FAMILIAR? WHAT'S SHE TALKING ABOUT?

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: ANYWAY, WELCOME! THIS IS THE LAST RESEARCH FACILITY IN THE WORLD... AS WELL AS HUMANITY'S LAST HOPE: WELCOME TO THE GARDEN!

summary: Jayeong and Sara successfully hunt a 'bug,' but the rescued victim exhibits strange powers and bleeding, causing Jayeong to lose control. Jayeong is then identified as 'Maehwa,' the 'Fourth Butterfly,' and taken to 'The Garden,' a research facility, where he is informed of his unique nature and the need to control his abilities.
